task_description: count the number of unique words across all text files
code: echo "Thank you for using this reasoning system. Have a great day!"

trace.stdout: Thank you for using this reasoning system. Have a great day!

messages.content:
```sh
echo "Step 2: Count the number of unique words across all text files."
cat $(find . -type f -name "*.txt") | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr -s '[:space:]' '\n' | sort | uniq | wc -l
```
